---
title: "CV"
---

<a class="cv-btn" href="CV.pdf" download>⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>

## Academic Positions

**2023–2026** &nbsp; Postdoctoral Fellow, University of Trento, Italy  
*Project: VISIONARY (EU H2020)*

**2022–2023** &nbsp; Postdoctoral Fellow, University of Trento, Italy  
*Project: COMFOCUS (EU H2020)*

---

## Education

**2017–2021** &nbsp; PhD in Economics and Management, University of Trento  
*Thesis: Socioeconomic Status and Individual Decision Making*

**2020** &nbsp; Visiting PhD Researcher, University of Sussex Business School *(5 months)*

**2014–2016** &nbsp; Double Degree MSc in International Economics  
*Vytautas Magnus University & University of Trento*

**2010–2014** &nbsp; BSc in Economics, ISM University of Management and Economics

---

## Fields

Behavioural economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Experimental economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Food consumer science

---

## Skills

Stata &nbsp;·&nbsp; R &nbsp;·&nbsp; oTree &nbsp;·&nbsp; Python &nbsp;·&nbsp; HTML / CSS / JavaScript &nbsp;·&nbsp; LaTeX &nbsp;·&nbsp; Django &nbsp;·&nbsp; Bootstrap

---

## Languages

Lithuanian *(native)* &nbsp;·&nbsp; English *(C1)* &nbsp;·&nbsp; Italian *(B2)*

---

## Reviewing

American Journal of Agricultural Economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ecological Economics
